full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Ayaan Khan, , that's a good hit. Again full outside off, Ayaan Khan shuffles across and gets under this, heaves powerfully and beats deep mid-wicket to his right, was the slower ball too

full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Ayaan Khan, , that's lucky. Ayaan Khan shuffles across outside off and swings at the slower ball, thick inside-edge misses off-stump and beats Cross to his right on the dive

full_text: Christopher Sole to Mehran Khan, 1 run, short of length and on middle, Mehran Khan flicks but mistimes it to the backward square leg region

short_text: Greaves to Pratik Athavale, Caught by McMullen!! Greaves strikes. He is a wicket-taker for this side. It was the tossed
full_text: Greaves to Pratik Athavale, Caught by McMullen!! Greaves strikes. He is a wicket-taker for this side. It was the tossed up googly on the stumps, Pratik Athavale goes for the slogsweep but does not get the connection, holes out to deep mid-wicket. McMullen judges it well as he dives forward to take it. A good knock comes to an end.

full_text: Greaves to Pratik Athavale, no run, was it the attempted googly? Hint of turn back in, close to off-stump, Pratik Athavale tries to run it down and misses

full_text: Greaves to Ayaan Khan, 1 run, a grunt of frustration from Ayaan Khan as he misses out on a big juicy full-toss outside off, he swipes and it's off the thick inside half to deep mid-wicket

full_text: Greaves to Ayaan Khan, no run, the googly on a good length outside off, punched to cover

full_text: Mark Watt to Ayaan Khan, no run, again Ayaan Khan gives the charge and it's a dart on a back of a length on the pads, he pulls and misses

full_text: Leask to Pratik Athavale, , Pratik Athavale comes down the track and lofts, does not get it off the middle, Munsey close to the cushions reverse-cups and palms it over, was he worried about the cushions?

full_text: Leask to Ayaan Khan, 2 runs, fraction short outside off, cut wide of sweeper cover for an easy two

full_text: Leask to Ayaan Khan, , no slip and four. A flat length delivery outside off, Ayaan Khan slashes and the thick outside-edge runs away to the third man fence

full_text: Wheal to Ayaan Khan, 1 run, back of a length ball rising on Ayaan Khan. He hops and works it towards mid-wicket for a sharp single

full_text: Wheal to Ayaan Khan, no run, fuller length ball sliding down leg, Ayaan Khan looks to work it across but is struck on the pads. He is not happy with himself

full_text: Wheal to Pratik Athavale, 1 run, Pratik Athavale backs away and uses his feet. Wheal bowls a slower one wide of him and he can only push it through covers

full_text: Wheal to Ayaan Khan, 1 run, slower back of a length ball around the hips, Ayaan Khan manages to get some bat on it and it goes through backward square leg

full_text: Wheal to Ayaan Khan, no run, length ball around off, Ayaan Khan opens his bat-face to dab it to point. He looks for a run but it's not on. There's a direct-hit at the bowler's end but Pratik Athavale was back by then

full_text: Christopher Sole to Pratik Athavale, , the last ball spoils the over! A shortish ball that sits up nicely for Pratik Athavale. He gets into a good position and pulls it with authority over deep backward square leg for a maximum

full_text: Christopher Sole to Pratik Athavale, no run, shortish delivery that gets big on Pratik Athavale. He splices his attempted flat-batted stroke over the bowler's head

full_text: Christopher Sole to Ayaan Khan, 1 run, fullish ball around off, Ayaan Khan strokes it to mid-off and the batters scurry across. There's a direct-hit at the bowler's end but Ayaan Khan had grounded his bat inside the crease by then

short_text: Mark Watt to Khalid Kail, Khalid Kail Run Out!! 1 run completed! Confusion and Khalid Kail gets the brunt of it! Khalid
full_text: Mark Watt to Khalid Kail, Khalid Kail Run Out!! 1 run completed! Confusion and Khalid Kail gets the brunt of it! Khalid Kail drives this one towards wide long-off for a single. The batters set off for the second run but Pratik Athavale sends his partner back when he is already halfway down the track. The throw is flat and accurate and Mark Watt does the rest.

full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Khalid Kail, no run, a length ball angling in on off, Khalid Kail fends it towards backward point. He looks for a run but it's not on

full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Khalid Kail, no run, beaten! Length ball outside off, shoots off the deck, Khalid Kail looks to run it down to third man and is lucky not to nick it behind

full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Pratik Athavale, 1 run, pitched up outside off, stroked to mid-on for a brisk single

short_text: Mark Watt to Zeeshan Maqsood, Caught by Cross!! Nice piece of bowling and Mark Watt strikes! On a length outside off, tu
full_text: Mark Watt to Zeeshan Maqsood, Caught by Cross!! Nice piece of bowling and Mark Watt strikes! On a length outside off, turns in with a bit of extra bounce, Zeeshan Maqsood looks to dab it late but it gets a bit big on him and edges it behind. Straight into the mitts of Cross. That was a sharp take.

short_text: Mark Watt to Pratik Athavale, 1 run, Pratik Athavale shuffles a bit and works it towards deep mid-wicket. Pratik Athaval
full_text: Mark Watt to Pratik Athavale, 1 run, Pratik Athavale shuffles a bit and works it towards deep mid-wicket. Pratik Athavale wants the second run but he is sent back. The throw goes to the wrong end and that allows Athavale allows to make it home easily

short_text: Mark Watt to Pratik Athavale, , sloppy this time! Quick and flat outside off, Pratik Athavale waits for it and places th
full_text: Mark Watt to Pratik Athavale, , sloppy this time! Quick and flat outside off, Pratik Athavale waits for it and places the cut towards short third. The fieder is lazy to put in the dive and the ball goes through. The chase is on but the ball wins the race

full_text: Mark Watt to Zeeshan Maqsood, 1 run, on the shorter side outside off, played with soft hands through mid-wicket

full_text: Mark Watt to Pratik Athavale, 1 run, full ball drifting in, flicked through mid-wicket

full_text: Mark Watt to Zeeshan Maqsood, 1 run, turning in from a back of a length outside off, Zeeshan Maqsood tucks it through mid-wicket

short_text: Safyaan Sharif to Pratik Athavale, , Pratik Athavale charges down the track, gets close to the pitch of the ball, and hi
full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Pratik Athavale, , Pratik Athavale charges down the track, gets close to the pitch of the ball, and hits it over extra cover to get the desired result. Played that one well

short_text: Safyaan Sharif to Pratik Athavale, no run, skiddy good length ball shaping in, Pratik Athavale looks to work it across b
full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Pratik Athavale, no run, skiddy good length ball shaping in, Pratik Athavale looks to work it across but is struck on the thigh pad

short_text: Safyaan Sharif to Pratik Athavale, , fullish ball shaping towards middle and leg, Pratik Athavale flicks it nicely throu
full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Pratik Athavale, , fullish ball shaping towards middle and leg, Pratik Athavale flicks it nicely through backward square leg. The fielder in the deep moves to his right but can't cut it off

short_text: Safyaan Sharif to Zeeshan Maqsood, 1 run, back of a length ball on middle and leg, Zeeshan Maqsood covers the line and w
full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Zeeshan Maqsood, 1 run, back of a length ball on middle and leg, Zeeshan Maqsood covers the line and works it round the corner for a single

short_text: Safyaan Sharif to Aqib Ilyas, Lbw!! Aqib Ilyas has been trapped in front but he has taken the review. Was a fullish ball
full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Aqib Ilyas, Lbw!! Aqib Ilyas has been trapped in front but he has taken the review. Was a fullish ball that swung in appreciably, Aqib Ilyas was caught in the crease and played down the wrong line to get hit on the back leg. Time for the replays. Over to ball-tracking and hitting is umpire's call. Clipping the leg-stump. Important breakthrough for Scotland.

short_text: Safyaan Sharif to Aqib Ilyas, , streaky but counts! A length ball outside off, some lift off the deck, Aqib Ilyas pokes
full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Aqib Ilyas, , streaky but counts! A length ball outside off, some lift off the deck, Aqib Ilyas pokes at it and gets an outside edge that flies past the diving keeper and through to the fence

short_text: Christopher Sole to Pratik Athavale, 2 runs, full once again and Pratik Athavale heaves it over mid-wicket. Not off the
full_text: Christopher Sole to Pratik Athavale, 2 runs, full once again and Pratik Athavale heaves it over mid-wicket. Not off the meat of the bat. Greaves moves across to his left and slides to cut it off. Saves two runs for his side

short_text: Christopher Sole to Pratik Athavale, 2 runs, fuller length ball swinging in from outside off, Pratik Athavale drags the
full_text: Christopher Sole to Pratik Athavale, 2 runs, fuller length ball swinging in from outside off, Pratik Athavale drags the heave off the inner half over mid-wicket and rushes back for the second run

short_text: Christopher Sole to Pratik Athavale, no run, Pratik Athavale once again uses his feet and Christopher Sole bowls it shor
full_text: Christopher Sole to Pratik Athavale, no run, Pratik Athavale once again uses his feet and Christopher Sole bowls it short outside off.

short_text: Christopher Sole to Pratik Athavale, no run, hard length ball in the channel, Pratik Athavale hangs back and blocks it t
full_text: Christopher Sole to Pratik Athavale, no run, hard length ball in the channel, Pratik Athavale hangs back and blocks it towards covers

short_text: Christopher Sole to Aqib Ilyas, 1 run, fullish ball shaping towards middle and leg, flicked to mid-wicket
full_text: Christopher Sole to Aqib Ilyas, 1 run, fullish ball shaping towards middle and leg, flicked to mid-wicket

short_text: Christopher Sole to Aqib Ilyas, , shot! A fullish ball angling into Aqib Ilyas's arc. He stays well balanced and whips i
full_text: Christopher Sole to Aqib Ilyas, , shot! A fullish ball angling into Aqib Ilyas's arc. He stays well balanced and whips it over deep backward square leg for a maximum. Hit that one with the breeze and that helped him

short_text: Wheal to Pratik Athavale, , a freebie and it's been dealt with! Shortish ball shaping towards leg-stump, Pratik Athavale
full_text: Wheal to Pratik Athavale, , a freebie and it's been dealt with! Shortish ball shaping towards leg-stump, Pratik Athavale moves inside the line and helps the pull over backward square leg to find the fence

short_text: Wheal to Pratik Athavale, 2 runs, Pratik Athavale once again gives the charge and Wheal shortens his length. He manages
full_text: Wheal to Pratik Athavale, 2 runs, Pratik Athavale once again gives the charge and Wheal shortens his length. He manages to clear mid-on with his expansive shot and gets a couple

short_text: Wheal to Aqib Ilyas, 1 run, Aqib Ilyas gets inside the line of this one and tucks it towards fine leg
full_text: Wheal to Aqib Ilyas, 1 run, Aqib Ilyas gets inside the line of this one and tucks it towards fine leg

short_text: Wheal to Pratik Athavale, leg byes, 1 run, skiddy back of a length ball, Pratik Athavale looks to pull it across but is
full_text: Wheal to Pratik Athavale, leg byes, 1 run, skiddy back of a length ball, Pratik Athavale looks to pull it across but is struck around the hips as the ball deflects towards backward point for a leg bye. That will hurt a bit

short_text: Wheal to Pratik Athavale, no run, length ball angling towards leg-stump, Pratik Athavale looks to work it across but is
full_text: Wheal to Pratik Athavale, no run, length ball angling towards leg-stump, Pratik Athavale looks to work it across but is struck on the pads

short_text: Wheal to Pratik Athavale, , a length ball outside off, Pratik Athavale goes after it and gets enough on it to get it wid
full_text: Wheal to Pratik Athavale, , a length ball outside off, Pratik Athavale goes after it and gets enough on it to get it wide of mid-off and through to the fence

short_text: Christopher Sole to Aqib Ilyas, , Aqib Ilyas doesn't need any sighters! A pitched up ball outside off, Aqib Ilyas frees
full_text: Christopher Sole to Aqib Ilyas, , Aqib Ilyas doesn't need any sighters! A pitched up ball outside off, Aqib Ilyas frees his arms and lifts it over cover-point for a boundary

short_text: Christopher Sole to Naseem Khushi, Caught by Mark Watt!! Naseem Khushi's scratchy knock comes to an end. Khushi premedit
full_text: Christopher Sole to Naseem Khushi, Caught by Mark Watt!! Naseem Khushi's scratchy knock comes to an end. Khushi premeditates as he shuffles across his stumps. It's a length ball outside off as he tries to scoop it over short fine but he completely mistimes it. Watt inside the ring pouches it safely.

short_text: Christopher Sole to Naseem Khushi, 2 runs, in the air... but falls down safely! Naseem Khushi looks to go downtown but m
full_text: Christopher Sole to Naseem Khushi, 2 runs, in the air... but falls down safely! Naseem Khushi looks to go downtown but miscues it. Luckily for him, it clears mid-off. A couple taken

short_text: Christopher Sole to Naseem Khushi, , Naseem Khushi connects this time! He gets the kind of length he could get underneat
full_text: Christopher Sole to Naseem Khushi, , Naseem Khushi connects this time! He gets the kind of length he could get underneath. He leans into it and hits it over extra cover for a gorgeous maximum

short_text: Christopher Sole to Naseem Khushi, no run, another play and a miss! Hard length ball in the channel, angling in, Naseem
full_text: Christopher Sole to Naseem Khushi, no run, another play and a miss! Hard length ball in the channel, angling in, Naseem Khushi looks to swipe it across without any conviction and gets beaten

short_text: Christopher Sole to Naseem Khushi, no run, 132.6kph back of a length ball wide outside off, some extra bounce again, Nas
full_text: Christopher Sole to Naseem Khushi, no run, 132.6kph back of a length ball wide outside off, some extra bounce again, Naseem Khushi was looking to play it across but lets it go eventually

short_text: Wheal to Pratik Athavale, no run, skiddy good length ball outside off, Pratik Athavale punches it towards cover-point. H
full_text: Wheal to Pratik Athavale, no run, skiddy good length ball outside off, Pratik Athavale punches it towards cover-point. He looks for a run but is rightly sent back by his partner

full_text: Wheal to Naseem Khushi, 1 run, Naseem Khushi uses his feet and mistimes the swipe towards deep backward square leg

full_text: Wheal to Naseem Khushi, no run, back of a length ball outside off, shoots off after landing, Naseem Khushi is taken aback and bails out of the pull shot

full_text: Wheal to Naseem Khushi, no run, good length ball around off, shaping in, Naseem Khushi uses his feet and tries to slog across the line but misses. That flew over the stumps

full_text: Wheal to Pratik Athavale, 1 run, back of a length ball angling in from outside off, Pratik Athavale looks to hit it down the ground but miscues it over the bowler's head. The batters scurry across for a single

full_text: Mark Watt to Naseem Khushi, 1 run, in the air... but safe! Tossed up ball, drifting in, Naseem Khushi goes for the big sweep but the extra bounce leads to a top-edge. The ball flies over short fine and falls down safely

full_text: Ayaan Khan to Cross, no run, flatter outside off, Cross gets beaten on his cut. Scotland only a couple of runs away from an emphatic win

full_text: Aqib Ilyas to Berrington, Bowled! Knocked him over. The straighter delivery on off, Berrington goes for a drive, gets beaten as the ball keeps straight and the stumps have been rattled. The Scotland skipper is gone after playing a couple of lovely shots.

full_text: Aqib Ilyas to Berrington, , tossed up delivery on off and Berrington goes inside out towards wide long-off, that's a boundary again. As easy as you like..

full_text: Mehran Khan to Munsey, Caught by Shakeel Ahmed!! The danger man departs! On a length around off, Munsey goes after it, swings hard and the top edge has been taken by the fielder at short third man. End of Munsey's rollicking cameo. Scotalnd in control as they need less than run-a-ball..

full_text: Mehran Khan to Munsey, , in the arc out of the park! On a length at the sticks, Munsey goes down on his knee and clubs it over deep square leg for half-a-dozen. Runs coming thick and fast!

full_text: Mehran Khan to Munsey, no run, on a length around off, Munsey chops this towards backward point

full_text: Mehran Khan to Munsey, , pressure on the bowler as he fires this down the leg-side, that's five wides!

full_text: Mehran Khan to Munsey, , smashes this over the bowler's head for four more. No stopping Munsey when he's in this form!

full_text: Kaleemullah to McMullen, , now over extra-cover. McMullen makes room and frees his arms, length delivery on the stumps, lofted over extra-cover and that's consecutive fours, Kaleemullah shakes his head

full_text: Kaleemullah to McMullen, no run, Fullish outside off, not there for the drive, McMullen spoons it and Maqsood on the dive to his right drops it, should have been taken. Not hit that hard too

full_text: Kaleemullah to McMullen, no run, I0$. Fullish and then nips back in off the seam, McMullen gets to drive, misses, rapped on the pads but going down and also high as Kaleemullah mentions. Rightly turned down

full_text: Shakeel Ahmed to Munsey, byes, 2 runs, Munsey is so lucky, turns around to reverse-sweep and misses, the ball just misses off-stump and deflects off the keeper's pads to fine-leg for two byes

full_text: Bilal Khan to Michael Jones, Caught by Mehran Khan!! Very good catch at mid-on. Michael Jones comes down the track and tries to loft the back of a length delivery on the rise, skies it and Mehran going back keeps his eyes and reverse-cups well. Jones chunters something under his breath as he walks away.

full_text: Bilal Khan to Michael Jones, no run, wild from Michael Jones and a good take by the keeper, Michael Jones comes down the track and misses the loft to a full delivery outside off, flies to the keeper who gloves it well

full_text: Bilal Khan to Michael Jones, , goes seam-up and pays the price. Full outside off, Michael Jones swings hard and the thick outside-edge flies over backward point and third man is in

full_text: Bilal Khan to Michael Jones, no run, slower ball on a good length on off, stops on Michael Jones who checks his push to cover

full_text: Shakeel Ahmed to Michael Jones, , Michael Jones is on the charge. No spin and just darts from Shakeel Ahmed, good length on the stumps, Michael Jones makes room and flat-bats it over the long-off fence, a flat hit

full_text: Shakeel Ahmed to Michael Jones, no run, fired in even quicker, good length on off, driven back

full_text: Shakeel Ahmed to Michael Jones, , that's clean from Michael Jones. A good length delivery on middle-stump, he gets forward and lofts over mid-on, all the way
